title: Host Hotels & Resorts Announces Appointments of Deanne Brand and Padmanabh Yardi
text: BETHESDA, Md., March 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the nation's largest lodging real estate investment trust (the “Company”), announced the appointments of Deanne Brand to senior vice president, strategy & analytics, and treasurer and Padmanabh Yardi to senior vice president, information technology.
